company_name: The name of the company for which the brand message consistency is being measured.
audit_year: The year in which the brand message consistency audit was carried out.
audit_result: The overall result of the brand message consistency audit, such as 'High Consistency', 'Medium Consistency', etc.
consistency_percentage: The percentage of the company's content that was found to be consistent with the brand message.
core_brand_keywords: The core brand keywords that the company aims to include in its official media content.
